name: pi-claude-code-auth
description: pi extension: authenticate the Anthropic provider via existing Claude Code OAuth credentials

scripts.install:pi: bun run build && mkdir -p $HOME/.pi/agent/extensions/claude-code-auth && cp dist/index.js $HOME/.pi/agent/extensions/claude-code-auth/index.js && cp dist/package.json $HOME/.pi/agent/extensions/claude-code-auth/package.json 2>/dev/null || true
